headline: NVIDIA Backs Corning To Build Optical Backbone For AI Factories
summary: NVIDIA (NasdaqGS:NVDA) and Corning have agreed a multi-billion-dollar partnership to expand U.S. optical connectivity manufacturing for AI infrastructure. The deal includes three new advanced manufacturing plants in North Carolina and Texas and is intended to increase Corning's domestic optical capacity tenfold. More than 3,000 jobs are expected to be created, with NVIDIA investing US$500 million via rights and warrants for Corning shares as part of the multi-year agreement. The partnership...

headline: The AI Summit London Unveils 10th Anniversary Speaker Line-Up Featuring Global Leaders in Enterprise AI
summary: LONDON, May 07, 2026--The AI Summit London today unveiled its keynote speaker line-up for the event’s 10th anniversary edition, bringing together senior leaders, technologists and policymakers from across the globe.
